# Extended Case References — Lecture CDneFQexLsc

## Cases mentioned in passing

### Oil City refinery explosion
- **canonical_cluster_id:** "Oil City refinery explosion"
- **Anchor:** `§6.p6`
- **Quote (layer 3):** "I'm going to give you a sort of homework assignment — you don't have to turn it in. One time, in the early 90s, I was asked to go look at an explosion that occurred and killed a woman welder, threw her across the river when this tank blew up that she was welding on, at an oil refinery in Oil City, Pennsylvania. Anybody from Pennsylvania, western Pennsylvania? Oil City — what's it near? Nothing, right. But what's north of it? Titusville. You ever heard of Titusville? What happened at Titusville in the 1850s? Edwin Drake drilled for oil. First oil well in the world, in Titusville. Ever heard of..."

### Pennzoil plant environmental regulation case
- **canonical_cluster_id:** "Pennzoil plant environmental regulation case"
- **Anchor:** `§8.p2`
- **Quote (layer 3):** "These are some of the externalities. There can be others. Anybody got another externality? Some other factor that influences how we engineer materials, or why we engineer materials? I told you about the Pennzoil plant and why they kept it open even though it made no economic sense. It made a lot of environmental sense — sorry, it made no environmental sense, but it made economic sense, because of some regulation. Anybody have an idea of any other externality? Let me know if you can think of something. **Student:** [The future is going to have to worry about... — inaudible.]"
